data.title: Altcoin selling pressure peaks at five-year high as confidence declines, matching outflows of 2021.
data.description: Selling pressure in the altcoin market remains strong, as net outflows have reached levels comparable to those witnessed in 2021.

data.title: Over half (51.4%) of U.S. residential builders are operating unprofitably, as per the 2026 industry report.
data.description: In Houston on February 18, 2026, it was reported that over 50% of residential building firms in the United States are running at a loss when proper accounting practices are considered. This information comes from the recent 2026 State of Residential Construction Industry (SORCI) Report issued by the Association of Professional Builders.
5-year JGB yield increases by 1 bp, reaching 1.630%.
GFZ recorded a 5.47‑magnitude earthquake in southern Iran.

data.title: Elizabeth Warren cautions against potential crypto bailout benefiting Trump family business, amid uncertain US intervention in Bitcoin drop.
data.description: Senator Elizabeth Warren expressed uncertainty regarding whether the US government has intentions to intervene in the ongoing selloff of Bitcoin, a popular digital currency. Warren's comments suggest a lack of clarity on potential government actions amidst the recent price fluctuations in the cryptocurrency market.

data.title: Aptos plans to revamp tokenomics with 2.1B hard cap, staking reward cuts, and 10x gas fee rise to bolster APT deflation.
data.description: The Aptos Foundation is planning to introduce several changes, including setting a hard cap of 2.1 billion tokens. They also intend to implement reductions in short-term staking rewards and increase gas fees by 10 times.
Copper, lithium unlikely to match gold’s gains as output rises: Goldman-scmp
JPMorgan lowers Fiverr International rating from Overweight to Neutral, trimming target price to $15.

data.title: Singapore and Cambodia's Supreme Courts signed MOU on Feb. 10, 2026 to enhance judicial cooperation.
data.description: On February 10, 2026, the Supreme Courts of Singapore and Cambodia inked a Memorandum of Understanding (MOU) to enhance bilateral judicial collaboration. This event signifies a major step in strengthening relations between the two countries' court systems.
JPMorgan lifts Howmet Aerospace target from $227 to $265.
Restoring investor confidence is vital for Indonesia’s sovereign backing, says S&P.

data.title: Global bone wax market expected to reach $73 million by 2033 at 3.2% CAGR due to rise in surgeries and product innovations.
data.description: The global bone wax market is experiencing growth due to an increase in the number of orthopedic and cardiovascular surgeries, along with a rising awareness of surgical hemostasis. Innovations in absorbable and synthetic bone wax formulations are also contributing to this growth. The market is particularly booming in Wilmington, Del. with a surge in demand. This trend was evident on February 18, 2026, as reported by PRNewswire.

data.title: Fortuna reveals Q4 and full-year 2025 performance.
data.description: A new report reveals that approximately 10,000 people attended a music festival over the weekend in the downtown area. Authorities reported that 25 arrests were made for various offenses, including disorderly conduct and drug possession. In addition, medical staff attended to 50 individuals for minor injuries and illnesses. The festival organizers have stated that they are pleased with the overall turnout and plan to continue hosting the event annually.
Piper Sandler lowers Booking Holdings (BKNG.O) target price to $5,000 from $5,750.

data.title: OpenAI tests AI agents for smart contract flaws as adoption rises, stressing importance of evaluating in real-world scenarios.
data.description: OpenAI emphasized the growing significance of assessing AI agents' performance in environments with economic relevance as their utilization continues to expand.

data.title: Eric Trump believes stablecoins could inject trillions into the US economy, saving the dollar. Investors seek dollar-pegged assets.
data.description: Eric Trump, co-founder of the World Liberty Financial (CRYPTO: WLFI) platform, expressed optimism during an interview that stablecoins have the potential to inject trillions into the U.S. economy and protect the dollar. He highlighted that stablecoins pegged 1:1 to the dollar could significantly boost demand for the greenback, stating that they could bring in "literally trillion dollars" and potentially enhance the currency's stability. Trump emphasized that these cryptocurrencies offer global investors, especially those in countries facing issues like corruption and inflation, an opportunity to access assets backed by the dollar and U.S. treasuries, thereby integrating them into the "greatest financial system" globally. The Trump family advocates for an upgrade to the U.S. dollar, positioning stablecoins as a viable solution to strengthen the currency.

data.title: Solar Pool Supply rebrands with focus on lifestyle and sustainability, with new tagline "Bringing Lifestyle to Your Pool."
data.description: Solar Pool Supply has revealed their updated brand strategy, emphasizing lifestyle, sustainability, and enhancing poolside living experiences. The company's new slogan, "Bringing Lifestyle to Your Pool," encapsulates this shift. Along with a fresh visual identity, Solar Pool Supply aims to stay true to their values by renewing their focus on providing high-quality products and services.

data.title: Report by IWSI America reveals how AI can enhance disability employment, with potential for reshaping future work.
data.description: IWSI America, a workforce development organization, recently released a report titled "AI Strategies for Disability Employment" focusing on the use of AI in improving job opportunities for individuals with disabilities. This report comes as AI continues to transform the employment landscape in the United States. The report highlights strategies to leverage AI's advantages in the workforce while also addressing the potential challenges it may present. The publication was made available on February 18, 2026, and it aims to provide valuable insights for both employers and job seekers in utilizing AI technologies effectively. It emphasizes the importance of incorporating AI in disability employment initiatives to maximize its impact.
